docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNI CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT KIDANE, GOITOM DOES 1=10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNI CORP. KIDANE, GOITOM
DECLARATION OF ARNOLD W. EVJE III IN SUPPORT FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
DECLARATION OF STEVE RING IN SUPPORT FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
